theme: First night in SF — the YC co-working space at 11pm
premise: You crash the YC space your first night in San Francisco. The room is mostly empty but three people are still here, each wanting something different from you.

cast.name: Maya
cast.blurb: Ex-Stripe engineer, three coffees deep, has a deck about you on her laptop she made on the BART ride over. Wants to be your cofounder.

cast.name: Brandon
cast.blurb: CEO of a competing startup with $4M and a year head start. Knows your name. Likes the espresso machine.

cast.name: Linda
cast.blurb: Partner emeritus at YC. Has watched 200 startups fail. Closes her book and asks if you've eaten. The question is a test.

scenes.setting: the YC co-working space, kitchen island, 11pm Tuesday

cast.name: Maya
cast.blurb: Ex-Stripe engineer; opens with an equity-sketch deck on her laptop.

scenes.topic: A founder you barely know corners you at the kitchen island and pitches herself as your cofounder. The conversation can go several ways depending on what you ask her.
scenes.imagePrompt: interior of a YC co-working space kitchen at night, warm fluorescent overhead, a young woman with a hoodie and laptop leaning across a kitchen island toward the founder
scenes.title: The Kitchen Pitch

scenes.setting: the espresso machine in the back hallway, ten minutes later

cast.name: Brandon
cast.blurb: Competing CEO. Greets you by name. Asks about runway.

scenes.topic: You bump into a competitor's CEO at the espresso machine. He probes for weaknesses in casual tone.
scenes.imagePrompt: espresso machine in a back hallway of a co-working space, two people in their late 20s, cinematic two-shot, golden lamplight
scenes.title: Espresso With The Enemy

scenes.setting: a corner couch in the same YC space, midnight

cast.name: Linda
cast.blurb: Partner emeritus at YC; closes her book as you walk past.

scenes.topic: A partner emeritus closes her book and asks if you've eaten. The question is a test that opens up into real conversation.
scenes.imagePrompt: interior of a co-working space common area at midnight, an older woman with reading glasses on a corner couch closing a hardback book, founder approaching, soft warm lighting
scenes.title: The Question About Dinner
